summary: Multiple ScreenConnect clients spawning PowerShell, suspicious outbound 443 traffic

notes.author: tier1.analyst
notes.text: EDR alert from CLIENT-WKS-17: ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe -> cmd.exe -> powershell.exe (encoded). NetFlow shows recurring 443 traffic to 185.62.58.132.

notes.author: msp.soc.manager
notes.text: MSP infra team says ScreenConnect is auto-updating and this is probably patch-related traffic. Asked for verification of server version and patch status.
